title: juncus secundiflorus
intro: Juncus secundiflorus, also known as the secondary-flowered rush, is a type of flowering plant in the Juncaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including being used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Juncus secundiflorus also include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine.
